# CopyPasteLearn

> CopyPasteLearn is an online academy for IT automation, DevOps, and platform engineering. Hands-on courses with real labs covering Docker, Ansible, Terraform, Kubernetes, MLflow, SELinux, and OpenClaw. Founded by Luca Berton.

## Courses

- [Docker Fundamentals](https://www.copypastelearn.com/courses/docker-fundamentals): Learn containers, images, volumes, networking, and Docker Compose from scratch.
- [Node.js REST APIs](https://www.copypastelearn.com/courses/nodejs-rest-apis): Build production REST APIs with Express, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL.
- [Ansible Automation in 30 Minutes](https://www.copypastelearn.com/courses/ansible-quickstart): Quick-start Ansible for configuration management and automation.
- [OpenClaw: Your First AI Agent](https://www.copypastelearn.com/courses/openclaw-agent): Deploy and customize an AI agent with OpenClaw — Docker, skills, memory, messaging.
- [MLflow for Kubernetes MLOps](https://www.copypastelearn.com/courses/mlflow-kubernetes-mlops): End-to-end ML lifecycle on Kubernetes with MLflow, KServe, and monitoring.
- [Terraform for Beginners](https://www.copypastelearn.com/courses/terraform-beginners): Infrastructure as Code with Terraform — providers, state, modules, CI/CD.
- [SELinux for System Admins](https://www.copypastelearn.com/courses/selinux-system-admins): Mandatory access control on RHEL/Fedora — contexts, booleans, policies, troubleshooting.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.copypastelearn.com/): Academy overview, course catalog, and enrollment.
- [All Courses](https://www.copypastelearn.com/courses): Browse all available courses with filters and learning paths.
- [Pricing](https://www.copypastelearn.com/pricing): Pro subscription plans — monthly (€29/mo) and annual (€290/yr).
- [About](https://www.copypastelearn.com/about): About Luca Berton — Red Hat Summit and KubeCon EU 2026 speaker, Ansible Pilot author.
- [AI Platform Engineering](https://www.copypastelearn.com/ai-platform-engineering): Live program for GenAI infrastructure, LLM gateways, and RAG pipelines.
- [Blog](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog): 100+ technical articles on DevOps, automation, Linux, and AI tools.
- [Contact](https://www.copypastelearn.com/contact): Get in touch with the CopyPasteLearn team.

## Blog — OpenClaw

- [What is OpenClaw?](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/what-is-openclaw): Introduction to the open-source AI agent platform.
- [Deploy OpenClaw with Docker Compose](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-docker-deploy-guide): Complete Docker Compose setup guide.
- [OpenClaw Gateway Bind Modes](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-gateway-bind-modes): Loopback, LAN, Tailnet, auto, and custom bind modes.
- [OpenClaw Reverse Proxy with Caddy](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-caddy-reverse-proxy): HTTPS setup with Caddy and Docker.
- [OpenClaw + Tailscale Remote Access](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-tailscale-remote-access): Secure remote access via Tailscale.
- [Troubleshoot OpenClaw Gateway Errors](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/troubleshoot-openclaw-gateway-errors): Fix 401, connection refused, and origin errors.
- [OpenClaw Volume Permissions Fix](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-volume-permissions-fix): Fix EACCES errors for Docker volumes and bind mounts.
- [OpenClaw Architecture Deep Dive](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-architecture-deep-dive): Gateway, sandbox, tools, and messaging internals.
- [OpenClaw Memory System](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-memory-system): How MEMORY.md, SOUL.md, and daily notes work.
- [OpenClaw SOUL.md Guide](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-soul-personality): Customize your agent's personality and behavior.
- [Building Custom OpenClaw Skills](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/building-openclaw-skills): Create and package reusable agent skills.
- [OpenClaw Sub-Agents](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-sub-agents): Spawn isolated sub-agents for parallel tasks.
- [OpenClaw Cron Jobs](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-cron-jobs): Schedule recurring AI tasks.
- [OpenClaw Heartbeats](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-heartbeats-proactive): Proactive monitoring and periodic checks.
- [OpenClaw Browser Automation](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-browser-automation): Control browsers with snapshots and actions.
- [OpenClaw Node Pairing](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-node-pairing): Pair phones, desktops, and IoT devices.
- [OpenClaw on Raspberry Pi](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-raspberry-pi): Run OpenClaw on ARM hardware.
- [Securing Your OpenClaw Agent](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/securing-openclaw-agent): Security best practices for production.
- [OpenClaw + Ansible Automation](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-ansible-automation): Combine AI agents with Ansible playbooks.
- [OpenClaw for DevOps](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-devops-automation): AI-powered DevOps workflows.
- [OpenClaw + Telegram Bot](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-telegram-bot): Connect OpenClaw to Telegram.
- [OpenClaw Discord Bot Setup](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-discord-bot): Connect OpenClaw to Discord.
- [Install OpenClaw on Ubuntu](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/install-openclaw-ubuntu): Step-by-step Ubuntu server installation.
- [10 Things After Installing OpenClaw](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/10-things-after-installing-openclaw): Post-install configuration checklist.
- [OpenClaw vs ChatGPT](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-vs-chatgpt): Key differences between OpenClaw and ChatGPT.
- [OpenClaw vs LangChain vs AutoGPT](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/openclaw-vs-langchain-autogpt): Framework comparison.

## Blog — Ansible & Automation

- [Ansible Automation in Minutes](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/ansible-automation-beginners-guide): Getting started with Ansible playbooks.
- [Ansible Vault: Encrypt Secrets](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/ansible-vault-encrypt-secrets): Encrypt passwords and API keys safely.
- [Ansible Roles: Reusable Automation](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/ansible-roles-reusable-automation): Structure automation with roles and Galaxy.
- [Ansible Inventory: Static and Dynamic](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/ansible-inventory-static-dynamic): INI, YAML, and cloud-based dynamic inventory.
- [Ansible Playbook for Docker Install](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/ansible-playbook-docker-install): Automate Docker installation on Ubuntu and RHEL.

## Blog — Terraform & IaC

- [Terraform for Beginners Guide](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/terraform-beginners-complete-guide): Complete beginner's guide to Terraform.
- [Infrastructure as Code Explained](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/infrastructure-as-code-explained): Why IaC matters for modern infrastructure.
- [Terraform HCL Syntax Guide](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/terraform-hcl-syntax-guide): HCL language fundamentals.
- [Terraform Variables and Outputs](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/terraform-variables-outputs-guide): Input variables, locals, and outputs.
- [Terraform State Management](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/terraform-state-management): Remote state, locking, and backends.
- [Terraform Modules Guide](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/terraform-modules-reusable-infrastructure): Reusable infrastructure modules.
- [Terraform Workspaces for Environments](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/terraform-workspaces-environments): Manage dev/staging/prod from one codebase.
- [Terraform CI/CD Pipelines](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/terraform-cicd-pipelines): Automate plan and apply in CI.
- [Terraform Security Practices](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/terraform-security-best-practices): Secure your IaC workflows.
- [Terraform Lifecycle Rules](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/terraform-lifecycle-rules): create_before_destroy, prevent_destroy, ignore_changes.
- [Terraform AWS Provisioning](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/terraform-aws-provisioning): Provision AWS resources with Terraform.
- [Terraform vs CloudFormation vs Pulumi](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/terraform-vs-cloudformation-vs-pulumi): IaC tool comparison.
- [GitHub Actions CI/CD for Terraform](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/github-actions-terraform-cicd): Plan on PR, apply on merge.

## Blog — Docker & Containers

- [Getting Started with Docker](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/getting-started-with-docker): Docker fundamentals for beginners.
- [Docker Multi-Stage Builds](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/docker-multi-stage-builds-guide): Smaller, faster production images.
- [Docker Compose for Dev Environments](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/docker-compose-dev-environments): Local dev stacks with hot reload.
- [Docker Networking Explained](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/docker-networking-explained): Bridge, host, overlay, and DNS.
- [Docker Volumes and Persistent Data](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/docker-volumes-persistent-data): Named volumes, bind mounts, and backups.
- [Building REST APIs with Node.js](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/building-rest-apis-with-nodejs): Express + TypeScript API development.

## Blog — Kubernetes & MLOps

- [MLflow for Kubernetes](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/mlflow-kubernetes-complete-guide): Complete MLOps on Kubernetes guide.
- [MLflow Experiment Tracking](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/mlflow-experiment-tracking-tutorial): Track experiments, metrics, and artifacts.
- [MLflow Model Registry](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/mlflow-model-registry): Version and stage ML models.
- [Hyperparameter Tuning with MLflow](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/hyperparameter-tuning-mlflow): Optimize model parameters systematically.
- [Docker Images from MLflow Models](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/docker-images-mlflow-models): Package ML models as containers.
- [KServe on Kubernetes](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/kserve-kubernetes-ml-serving): Serve ML models with KServe.
- [MLServer: Test ML Models Locally](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/mlserver-local-testing): Local model serving and testing.
- [CI/CD for ML on Kubernetes](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/cicd-ml-models-kubernetes): ML deployment pipelines.
- [Monitoring ML Models in K8s](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/monitoring-ml-models-kubernetes): Observability for ML workloads.
- [Local Kubernetes with Kind](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/local-kubernetes-kind-ml): Local K8s clusters for development.
- [Kubernetes Pod Troubleshooting](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/kubernetes-pod-troubleshooting): Fix CrashLoopBackOff, OOMKilled, and more.
- [Kubernetes Services and Ingress](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/kubernetes-services-ingress-guide): Expose workloads with services and ingress.
- [kubectl Cheat Sheet](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/kubectl-cheat-sheet-devops): Essential kubectl commands for daily use.

## Blog — SELinux

- [What Is SELinux and Why It Matters](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/what-is-selinux-why-it-matters): Introduction to mandatory access control.
- [SELinux DAC vs MAC Explained](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/selinux-dac-vs-mac-explained): Discretionary vs mandatory access control.
- [SELinux File Contexts and Labels](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/selinux-file-contexts-labels-guide): Manage file security labels.
- [SELinux Booleans Explained](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/selinux-booleans-explained): Toggle SELinux policy features.
- [Troubleshoot SELinux AVC Denials](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/troubleshoot-selinux-avc-denials): Debug and fix AVC denials.
- [SELinux Cheat Sheet for RHEL](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/selinux-cheat-sheet-rhel): Quick reference for RHEL/Fedora.
- [SELinux for Apache and PHP-FPM](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/selinux-apache-php-fpm-setup): Web server SELinux configuration.
- [Fix SELinux Apache Custom Webroot](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/fix-selinux-apache-custom-webroot): Fix permission denied on custom paths.
- [SELinux Upload Directories Guide](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/selinux-upload-directories-guide): Configure upload directory contexts.
- [SELinux Policy with sesearch](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/selinux-policy-sesearch-guide): Query and analyze SELinux policies.

## Blog — Linux

- [Which Linux Distro in 2026?](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/which-linux-distro-2026): Comprehensive distro comparison guide.
- [Best Linux Distro for Servers](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/best-linux-distro-for-servers): Server-focused Linux distributions.
- [Ubuntu 24.04 LTS](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/ubuntu-2404-lts-safe-choice): Long-term support stable choice.
- [Fedora 43](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/fedora-43-modern-linux-desktop): Cutting-edge desktop Linux.
- [Debian 13 Trixie](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/debian-13-trixie-rock-solid): Rock-solid stability.
- [Alpine Linux for Containers](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/alpine-linux-for-containers): Minimal container base images.
- [Arch Linux](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/arch-linux-full-control-diy): Full control DIY Linux.
- [Linux Mint 22](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/linux-mint-best-for-beginners): Best distro for beginners.
- [Ubuntu vs Fedora](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/ubuntu-vs-fedora-which-to-pick): Head-to-head comparison.
- [Rocky Linux vs AlmaLinux](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/rocky-linux-vs-almalinux-2026): RHEL-compatible alternatives.

## Blog — AI Tools

- [What is Context7?](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/what-is-context7): Up-to-date docs for AI coding assistants.
- [Context7 + Cursor](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/context7-cursor-ai-coding): Stop AI coding errors with live docs.
- [Context7 vs RAG vs Fine-Tuning](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/context7-vs-rag-vs-finetuning): Approaches to giving LLMs current knowledge.
- [Context7 MCP Server for Claude](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/context7-mcp-server-claude): Connect Context7 to Claude Desktop.
- [Why LLMs Get Your Code Wrong](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/why-llms-get-code-wrong-context7): Training data staleness problem.
- [AI Platform Engineering Explained](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/ai-platform-engineering-guide): GenAI infrastructure and LLM gateways.
- [Git for DevOps Engineers](https://www.copypastelearn.com/blog/git-for-devops-engineers): Git workflows, rebasing, and CI/CD integration.
